nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=85 beats='Nina and Theo find an old rolled-up map inside a dusty jar under Grandpa's big backyard oak; the map is hand-drawn with a dotted line and a red X somewhere at the end; the friends grin and decide which landmark on the map to follow first; sunny, safe, and excited'>>

choices.label: Follow the map to the great old oak.
Follow the map to the garden shed.
Follow the map down to the stream.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='the dotted line points first to the great old oak at the top of the garden; Nina holds the map while Theo counts the paces; the oak is so big that three kids could hide behind it; the line seems to split near its roots'>>

choices.label: Search around the roots of the oak.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='at the foot of the oak the dotted line splits into two faint trails; one wiggles toward the mossy hollow log where something is croaking softly, the other loops toward the old tire swing hanging from a low branch; the friends decide which way the map means'>>

choices.label: Take the trail to the hollow log.
Take the trail to the tire swing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='they follow the trail to the hollow log lying in the long grass; it is bigger than a barrel and one end is dark and cool; a friendly croaking sound comes from somewhere deep inside it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Nina peeks into the hollow log with her flashlight while Theo checks the map; the dotted line seems to go right through the log and out the other side; the croaking grows busier, like a tiny cheerful crowd'>>

choices.label: Follow the map through the log.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='past the log the map is smudged by an old raindrop and two little paths lead away; one path is dry and dusty going back toward the fence, the other is soft and mossy going down toward the damp corner of the garden; they must guess which one the mapmaker meant'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=70 beats='the dry path just curves back to the garden fence and stops at a pile of old flowerpots, with no X and no treasure in sight; the friends laugh, roll the map up, and skip back to the porch for a big glass of cold lemonade, happy to try again tomorrow'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the mossy path is springy and cool under their sneakers; ferns brush their knees and the croaking grows louder and happier; Theo whispers that it sounds like hundreds of tiny voices all talking at once'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='the path dips into a shady green hollow where the ground is soft and dotted with smooth flat stones; each stone looks a little like a tiny doorway; the friends step carefully and follow the dotted line deeper'>>

choices.label: Step into the shady green hollow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='in the green hollow they find a ring of round pebbles set out like a tiny wall; behind it, plump spotted toads sit on leaf-thrones and lily-pad chairs; not one of them hops away'>>

choices.label: Tiptoe up to the ring of pebbles.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the biggest toad wears a crown of clover and blinks slowly at the visitors; Nina and Theo kneel down very gently so they will not frighten anyone; the map's red X is drawn right here in the corner'>>

choices.label: Kneel down by the toad king.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=78 beats='the friends have found a whole tiny toad kingdom hidden in the shady hollow, with a clover-crowned toad king on his leafy throne; they promise to keep it secret and safe, and leave a soft green leaf as a gift; all the way home they can hardly stop grinning'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='they follow the loop of the trail to the old tire swing hanging from a low oak branch; the tire turns slowly in the breeze; someone has tied bright ribbons to the rope that flutter and shine'>>

choices.label: Look at the ribbons on the swing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Theo gives the tire a gentle push and hears a soft tinkling sound from higher up in the tree; Nina looks at the map, where the dotted line climbs the trunk toward the leaves; the tinkling sounds just like tiny bells'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='the dotted line splits at a knot in the trunk; one branch of the line goes left toward the thick prickly leaves, the other goes right along a smooth low limb that is easy to walk; the friends choose which way to follow the ringing'>>

choices.label: Walk along the smooth low limb.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=68 beats='the prickly left branch is a tangle of twigs that leads nowhere but an empty bird box; the friends give up on that route with a giggle, hop off the swing, and head back to the porch for lemonade and a rest, sure the X is hiding somewhere else'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='the smooth low limb is easy to balance along, and the tinkling gets clearer with every step; Nina keeps one hand on the trunk while Theo watches the map; the branch curves toward a sunny gap in the leaves'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='they reach a place where hundreds of little things dangle from the twigs on bits of string; keys, shells, spoons, and buttons all knock together in the wind; the whole tree seems to be singing softly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='someone long ago hung a wind chime on every branch of this hidden corner of the oak; sunlight bounces off the shiny bits and scatters little rainbows on the leaves; the friends stand very still and just listen'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='in the middle of the singing branches hangs the biggest chime of all, made from an old watering can and shining spoons; the map's red X floats right beside it; Nina reaches out and gives it the gentlest touch'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=76 beats='the friends have found a secret wind-chime tree that sings all by itself whenever the breeze blows; they add one small shell of their own to the branches so the tree will sing a little louder; they walk home humming the tree's happy tune'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='the dotted line points next across the lawn to the little green garden shed near the fence; Theo hops over a flowerbed while Nina reads the map; the shed door hangs open just a crack, and something inside gives a soft creak'>>

choices.label: Sneak up to the garden shed.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='behind the shed the trail on the map splits in two; one line slips inside the shed's open door into the cool shadows, the other runs off toward the big grey rock pile stacked against the back fence; the friends pick which to explore'>>

choices.label: Head to the big rock pile.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='they push the shed door open and dusty golden light spills across old flowerpots and coiled hoses; it smells of soil and dry wood; the dotted line leads to the far dark corner behind the wheelbarrow'>>

choices.label: Follow the light to the corner.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Nina tiptoes past rakes and watering cans while Theo holds the map steady; in the corner a stack of crates is piled up like steps, and a faint light glows from a gap near the roof; something up there looks cozy'>>

choices.label: Look at the stack of crates.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the map is torn right at this spot and two ways go on; a low gap leads under the workbench into the dark, and a wobbly ladder of crates climbs up toward the glowing gap near the roof; the friends decide which way the X wants them to go'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=70 beats='the low gap under the workbench is just a cobwebby dead end full of old plant pots and a sleepy woodlouse; the friends back out sneezing and laughing, dust the map off, and trot back to the porch for cold lemonade before trying another trail'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the crate ladder wobbles just a little but holds, and the friends climb toward the warm glowing gap; Theo goes first and gasps softly at what he sees; Nina scrambles up right behind him'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='up in the loft of the shed someone has built a cozy little hideaway from old cushions, a milk-crate table, and a lantern that runs on batteries; a hand-painted sign hangs above the doorway; it feels warm and secret'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='inside the little hideaway are two comfy seats, a shelf of adventure books, and a jar of shiny paper stars; a blanket is folded neatly in the corner as if it is waiting for visitors; the map's red X is right here'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the painted sign over the doorway reads Explorers Welcome in bright friendly letters; Nina and Theo realize this must be a secret fort built by kids long ago and left ready for whoever found the map next; they step inside like honored guests'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=78 beats='the friends have found a snug secret fort hidden in the top of the garden shed, all ready for new explorers; they write their own names in the little logbook on the shelf and promise to come back and take good care of it; this will be their headquarters from now on'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the other line leads to the big grey rock pile stacked against the back fence, warm from the afternoon sun; a few marigolds grow in the cracks; the dotted line points to a low flat stone near the bottom'>>

choices.label: Look at the low flat stone.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Theo taps the flat stone and it sounds hollow, like there is a space underneath; Nina checks the map, where the red X sits just below the rocks; a little ring of pebbles seems to mark the very spot'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='two small arrows are scratched faintly on the flat stone; one arrow points left toward a gap between two mossy boulders, the other points down at the loose sandy soil right beneath the flat stone; the friends choose where to look'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=68 beats='the gap between the mossy boulders is just a snug home for a busy line of ants marching to and fro, with no treasure to be seen; the friends say a polite hello to the ants, roll up the map, and wander back to the porch for a lemonade break'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='they gently lift the loose flat stone and set it aside, and underneath the sandy soil is soft and easy to brush away; Theo digs with a garden trowel while Nina cups her hands; something smooth and round soon appears'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='a little tin box with a rusty latch sits nestled in the sand, just where the X promised; it is exactly the size for two hands to lift; the friends carefully wiggle it free and blow the dust off the lid'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the latch pops open with a happy click and inside, wrapped in an old checkered cloth, is a whole collection of glass marbles; they catch the sunlight in swirls of blue, green, and gold; Nina gasps with delight'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='there are cats-eyes, swirlies, and one big shooter as clear as a raindrop, dozens of marbles saved by some other kid years and years ago; a tiny note in the box simply says share and enjoy; the friends read it twice'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=76 beats='the friends have dug up a hidden box of beautiful glass marbles left as treasure by a kid from long ago; they choose two favorites to keep and leave the rest tucked back with a note of their own for the next lucky finder; they walk home clinking a marble in each pocket'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='the last part of the dotted line runs down the sloping lawn to the little stream at the bottom of the garden where it meets the park; the water chatters over smooth stones; Theo holds the map high so it will not get wet'>>

choices.label: Head down to the little stream.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='down by the water the map's line splits one final time; one branch curves into the tall blackberry bushes along the bank, the other hops out across a row of flat stepping stones to the far side of the stream; the friends decide which way the treasure lies'>>

choices.label: Follow the line into the brambles.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='they follow the line into the shade of the tall blackberry bushes, heavy with ripe purple berries; the leaves make a cool green tunnel; from somewhere deeper inside comes a soft, friendly meow'>>

choices.label: Follow the meow into the bushes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Nina holds a branch aside so no thorns catch their sleeves, and the meowing comes again, closer this time; Theo checks the map, where the dotted line winds right into the middle of the bramble patch; they step in gently'>>

choices.label: Hold the thorns aside and go in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='inside the bushes the trail on the map is faded and two little tunnels lead on through the leaves; one tunnel goes low toward a dark thorny thicket, the other goes toward a patch of warm sunlight where the meowing sounds happiest; they pick a way'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=70 beats='the low tunnel just ends in a thick tangle of thorns too prickly to pass, with only a lost sock caught on a branch; the friends carefully back out without a single scratch, laugh at the silly sock, and head up to the porch for a cool glass of lemonade'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the sunny tunnel opens into a cozy little clearing right in the heart of the brambles, floored with soft dry leaves; the meowing turns into a rumbly purr; two green eyes blink at them from a warm nest of grass'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='a fluffy grey cat with white paws is curled up in the sunny clearing, and it does not run away at all; instead it stretches, yawns, and pads right over to say hello; it wears a little collar with a bell'>>

choices.label: Say hello to the fluffy cat.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='the cat winds around their ankles, purring like a tiny engine, and flops over for a belly rub; the friends laugh and stroke its soft fur; the map's red X is drawn right where the cat has made its cozy hideaway'>>

choices.label: Give the cat a belly rub.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the collar has a small tag that reads Pepper, please be my friend, but no address at all; the cat clearly knows this bramble clearing well and treats the friends like old pals; Nina and Theo wonder if Pepper has been waiting for the map to be found'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=78 beats='the friends have found a friendly lost cat named Pepper living happily in a secret bramble clearing; they share their afternoon snack with their new pal and promise to visit every single day and help find where he belongs; Pepper walks them halfway home with his tail held high'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the stepping stones cross the chattering stream in a neat flat row, dry on top and easy to hop; the friends cross one careful stone at a time to the mossy far bank; the dotted line points to the roots of a leaning willow tree'>>

choices.label: Hop across to the far bank.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='on the far bank the willow trails its long green fingers in the water, and the ground beneath its roots is soft and cool; Theo studies the map, where the red X sits tucked among the tangled roots; something glints faintly in the shade'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='two hollows show among the willow roots; one is a wet muddy dip right at the water's edge, the other is a dry sheltered nook a little higher up where the glinting seems to come from; the friends choose where the X is pointing'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=68 beats='the muddy dip at the water's edge holds nothing but a shiny wet pebble and one very surprised water beetle; the friends grin at their muddy sneakers, wave to the beetle, and hop back across the stones for a well-earned glass of lemonade'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='the dry sheltered nook is just the right size to kneel in, and the glinting comes from something half-buried in the cool soil; Nina brushes the earth away gently while Theo holds the willow branches back; a corner of metal appears'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='it is a small brass tin, green at the edges but still shut tight, exactly where the map's X promised; the friends work the stiff lid with careful fingers; at last it opens with a soft puff of old air'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='inside the tin, gleaming on a bed of faded velvet, is a heap of shiny buttons of every kind; brass buttons, glass buttons, and pearly ones shaped like little flowers; they sparkle like real jewels in the dappled light'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='someone has kept these special buttons safe here for years, each one different and lovely, a true backyard treasure; a folded slip of paper inside reads for the finder, with love; the friends feel like they have opened a chest of pirate gold'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=76 beats='the friends have unearthed a hidden tin of dazzling shiny buttons, the real treasure at the end of the map; they pick one gleaming button each to keep as a memory and rebury the tin with a new note for the next explorer; they cross the stepping stones home feeling rich as kings'>>
